en: What were you thinking? I'm only kidding, I'm only kidding, hey.
Hey, look, do us a favour and get Denborn Bug pass security.
ko: 이봐, 부탁이 있는데 덴본 버그를 보안 통과시켜줘.

en: They want to go on the pitch, take a few snaps and all that, yeah?
ko: 그들이 경기장에 가서 사진 몇 장 찍고 싶어 하거든, 그렇지?

en: I'd rather them not. Yeah, they just want to look around, it'll only take a second. Who cares?
I'd rather them not. What? What, you're not going to go little moody bitch
just because you've got your arse served to you on a plate, are you? Don't speak to me like that.
Huh? Don't speak to me like that. Uh-huh. Don't speak to me like that. Uh-huh.
OK, well, let's see if you can hear this.
ko: 좋아, 그럼 네가 이걸 들을 수 있는지 보자, 응?

en: You know that Ickle TV show you made?
ko: 네가 만든 그 유치한 TV 쇼 있잖아?

en: It just made it easier for Manchester City to kick you to the kerb.
ko: 그게 맨체스터 시티가 너를 내쫓기 쉽게 만들었어.

en: Look where you are now. Twaddling about with a bunch of amateurs.
No offence, no offence. SHE LAUGHS
Yeah? Don't turn your back on me, you pussy.
ko: 나한테 등을 돌리지 마, 겁쟁이야. 오! 아!
